gaps.description: PRD §1: StorageBackend interface — all methods (get, set, delete, list, scan, scanStream, batchGet, batchSet, stat) present in src/types.ts
PRD §1: list() path format consistency across backends — implemented with / prefix

PRD §1: scan() streaming — OPFSBackend uses true streaming via chunked reads; NodeFsBackend uses readline streams; AgenticStoreBackend loads full file content into memory before splitting lines (inherent KV store limitation)
PRD §2: File metadata size/mtime/stat() with permissions field {read, write} on all backends
PRD §2: Symlink support in NodeFsBackend with cycle detection
PRD §2: batchGet/batchSet on all three primary backends + exposed as AgenticFileSystem methods and agent tools
PRD §3: Typed error classes NotFoundError/PermissionDeniedError/IOError in src/errors.ts
PRD §3: All backends throw typed errors with consistent re-throw pattern
PRD §3: readOnly mode write interception in filesystem.ts
PRD §4: Complete per-backend test suites in test/ and test/backends/
PRD §5: README with usage examples, per-backend config docs, and performance comparison table
PRD §5: JSDoc on all backend classes including NodeFsBackend
PRD §6: File tools — getToolDefinitions() returns all 9 MCP-compatible tool schemas (file_read, file_write, grep, ls, file_delete, file_tree, batch_get, batch_set, grep_stream)
PRD §6: Shell tools — shellFsTools with shell_cat, shell_head, shell_tail, shell_find, shell_delete, shell_tree
PRD §6: Semantic search — grep with semantic:true option using EmbedBackend (TfIdfEmbedBackend)
PRD §1.4: createBackend() auto-selection logic matches documented priority order
